configurations.name: Debug iOS Simulator (MAUI)
runtimeArgs: dotnet workload list | grep -q '^maui' || { echo '❌ MAUI workload missing. Run the "Install MAUI Workload (sudo)" launch entry first.'; exit 1; }; out=$(dotnet build -t:Run -f net9.0-ios 2>&1); status=$?; echo "$out"; if echo "$out" | grep -q 'requires Xcode'; then echo ''; echo '⚠️  Your iOS workload pack does not match the installed Xcode. Run the "Update MAUI Workload (sudo) — fixes Xcode mismatch" launch entry.'; fi; exit $status

configurations.name: Debug iOS Device (MAUI)
runtimeArgs: dotnet workload list | grep -q '^maui' || { echo '❌ MAUI workload missing. Run the "Install MAUI Workload (sudo)" launch entry first.'; exit 1; }; out=$(dotnet build -t:Run -f net9.0-ios -p:RuntimeIdentifier=ios-arm64 -p:_DeviceName=Default 2>&1); status=$?; echo "$out"; if echo "$out" | grep -q 'requires Xcode'; then echo ''; echo '⚠️  Your iOS workload pack does not match the installed Xcode. Run the "Update MAUI Workload (sudo) — fixes Xcode mismatch" launch entry.'; fi; exit $status

configurations.name: Debug Android (MAUI)
runtimeArgs: dotnet workload list | grep -q '^maui' || { echo '❌ MAUI workload missing. Run: sudo dotnet workload install maui (or use the "Install MAUI Workload (sudo)" launch entry).'; exit 1; } && (adb uninstall dev.hyo.martie || true) && dotnet build -t:Run -f net9.0-android

configurations.name: Debug macCatalyst (MAUI)
runtimeArgs: dotnet workload list | grep -q '^maui' || { echo '❌ MAUI workload missing. Run: sudo dotnet workload install maui (or use the "Install MAUI Workload (sudo)" launch entry).'; exit 1; } && dotnet build -t:Run -f net9.0-maccatalyst

configurations.name: Build Library (all targets)
runtimeArgs: dotnet workload list | grep -q '^maui' || { echo '❌ MAUI workload missing. Run: sudo dotnet workload install maui (or use the "Install MAUI Workload (sudo)" launch entry).'; exit 1; } && dotnet build

configurations.name: Update MAUI Workload (sudo) — fixes Xcode mismatch
Clean (bin + obj)
runtimeArgs: find . -type d \( -name bin -o -name obj \) -prune -exec rm -rf {} + && echo '✅ cleaned'
